semantic_description: Computes an output integer array of length n - 1 where each element out[i] is the adjacent difference a[i + 1] - a[i]. The function preserves the input array a, writes every element of the caller-provided output array out, uses one for loop with guard i + 1 < n, and allows the loop body to be skipped when n == 1 so the output length is zero.
